parts.text: [Memory add — memory] [CRON · 永久] anthropic-daily-learner(job_id:05c0797cb99e): 每天9:30采集anthropic.com/engineering+claude.com/blog(agents+claude-code分类)，脚本~/.hermes/scripts/daily-anthropic-learner.py，输出.anthropic-learner-output.json，cron prompt提取洞察→viking_remember(category=agent-theory/hermes-optimization)，状态文件.anthropic-learner-state.json追踪已处理文章
